TopModule.BindInstances: icmp_ln500_fu_415_p2 add_ln502_fu_425_p2 icmp_ln503_fu_432_p2 icmp_ln505_fu_452_p2 add_ln507_fu_458_p2 select_ln505_fu_464_p3 CTRL_s_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
height, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of height,
width, 0x18, 32, W, Data signal of width,
bckgndId, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of bckgndId,
ovrlayId, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of ovrlayId,
maskId, 0x30, 32, W, Data signal of maskId,
motionSpeed, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of motionSpeed,
colorFormat, 0x40, 32, W, Data signal of colorFormat,
crossHairX, 0x48, 32, W, Data signal of crossHairX,
crossHairY, 0x50, 32, W, Data signal of crossHairY,
ZplateHorContStart, 0x58, 32, W, Data signal of ZplateHorContStart,
ZplateHorContDelta, 0x60, 32, W, Data signal of ZplateHorContDelta,
ZplateVerContStart, 0x68, 32, W, Data signal of ZplateVerContStart,
ZplateVerContDelta, 0x70, 32, W, Data signal of ZplateVerContDelta,
boxSize, 0x78, 32, W, Data signal of boxSize,
boxColorR, 0x80, 32, W, Data signal of boxColorR,
boxColorG, 0x88, 32, W, Data signal of boxColorG,
boxColorB, 0x90, 32, W, Data signal of boxColorB,
dpDynamicRange, 0xc0, 32, W, Data signal of dpDynamicRange,
dpYUVCoef, 0xc8, 32, W, Data signal of dpYUVCoef,
field_id, 0xd0, 32, W, Data signal of field_id,
bck_motion_en, 0xd8, 32, W, Data signal of bck_motion_en,

table.keys: Interface, Direction, Register Mode, TDATA, TDEST, TID, TKEEP, TLAST, TREADY, TSTRB, TUSER, TVALID
Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Info
